text: Love the new dashboard layout! Much cleaner than before.
The new widgets look great. Setup was easy.
App crashed when I tried to add a custom widget. Had to restart.
Payment failed twice. Very frustrating. I need this for work.
Dashboard loads slowly. Takes 8-10 seconds every time I open it.
Used to love this app, but since the update it's been a mess. Constant crashes.
Nice visual upgrade overall. Graphs are much easier to read.
My data disappeared after I updated. Where did my saved reports go?
Keeps crashing on the analytics page. iPhone 14, iOS 17.
Hey @PurpleMerit the new dashboard update is BROKEN. Fix it please!
The widget customization is a great idea but it crashes too often.
Tried to pay for premium upgrade, got an error every time. Charged me once but didn't upgrade.
Meh. It's fine. Nothing special about the new version.
I'm switching to a competitor. Too many bugs since the update.
App is unusable. Crashes 3-4 times per session. This is embarrassing.
Support response was quick at least. But the bug is still there.
API integration stopped working after the update. Our whole team is blocked.
The dark mode feature is amazing. Finally!
Three failed payment attempts on @PurpleMerit today. This is a joke.
Dashboard widgets keep resetting to default after every refresh.
Performance has seriously degraded. The old version was faster.
I paid for an annual plan and now the app doesn't work properly. Requesting refund.
Had a crash while saving important data. Lost 2 hours of work.
New charts are beautiful. Would be perfect if it stopped crashing.
Can't complete onboarding — it freezes at step 3 every single time.
Honestly @PurpleMerit used to be my favorite productivity tool. Now I'm looking for alternatives.
Rollback the update please. This is not ready for production.
I work in IT and this release should never have passed QA. Multiple critical bugs.
Good concept, poor execution. Lots of potential though.
Crashes specifically on Android 13 when switching tabs. Reproducible every time.
Your competitor just released a similar feature and it works flawlessly. Food for thought.
Works perfectly on my desktop browser. No issues at all!
Payment double-charged me. Please issue a refund ASAP.
The loading spinner never stops. Dashboard never loads on mobile.
Downgraded to 1 star. Was 5 stars before the 'update'. Please fix or revert.
